rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/18/20. (No earlier date available.) No courtesy copies (other than the attorney's declaration filed on 1/28/20) and proposed order have been received by the reviewing Examiner. [LRSF 2.7 B., 14.6 A., and 14.93 G.] Original bank statements must be filed to verity the cash on hand. [LRSF 14.62.] A declaration re the retention of original documents must also be filed. [LRSF 2.11 M.4.] The attorney costs must clearly indicate what was filed or sent by messenger (and to whom), not just list e-filing fees or messenger services without any further descriptioin.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ADELIA E. INGRAM LIVNG TRUST OF 2013 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Inspection Demands And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel is granted in part. No timely opposition was filed. Objectors are entitled to a response to the request for production separately addressing each of the 66 requests. Given the history of the communications leading up to the response to the request for production, objections are not deemed waived. Objectors are awarded $1260 as reasonable sanctions because Petitioner was not substantially justified in her response to the discovery request. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise opposing parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, February 4, 2020.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FIDEL ANGEL ANDRADE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/18/20. No courtesy copies. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.93 G.] No proposed order. [LRSF 14.6 A.] No proof of publication. No proof of service. The petition appears to be incomplete (incomplete caption, neither item 5a(a)(7) or (8) was answered, it is unclear who Fidel P. Andrade is, etc.) or erroneous (items 6 and 7 were completed). If Fidel P. Andrade is an heir and a citizen of El Salvador, notice must be given to the consular official of El Salvador. [Probate Code Section 8113.] Courtesy copies of all pleadings and a proposed order must be received by the reviewing Examiner by no later than 3/11/20 to avoid an automatic continuance.
